## Checklist

- [ ] I previewed my changes locally with `npm run start`
- [ ] Headings and structure match the English source (for translations)
- [ ] Frontmatter keys are in English
- [ ] No machine-translated text without human review
- [ ] Links in translated pages point to the correct targets
